item.title: Turning Inspection Data into Action – Metrologic DCS Introduces \xe2\x80\x98Inspection Flow\xe2\x80\x99
item.description: \xe2\x80\x98Inspection Flow\xe2\x80\x99 interprets inspection data in context - tolerances, criticality, inspection intent, and process history.

item.title: Vision Systems as Part of a Larger Quality Architecture
item.description: The role of solution providers is evolving working with manufacturers to define failure modes, identify risks and implement tailored solutions.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) Equipment Market Report
item.description: A recent market report highlights the growing Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) equipment market and its commercial impact on quality control.

item.title: How AI-driven Vision Systems Are Transforming Automotive Quality Control
item.description: AI-driven vision systems are transforming automotive quality control.

item.title: FARO CREAFORM Cuts Laser Line Probe Time to Data on Challenging Surfaces
item.description: FARO CREAFORM, a business of AMETEK, Inc., announced an update for its Laser Line Probe (LLP) portfolio used with the Quantum X FaroArm\xc2\xae Series and Quantum Max FaroArm Series.

item.title: Optris Expands CTi Pyrometer Portfolio with High-Speed Industrial Models
item.description: Optris GmbH & Co. KG has announced the expansion of its successful CTi pyrometer lineup with the introduction of the CTi 1M and CTi 2M models, designed to deliver highly accurate, non-contact temperature measurement in demanding industrial environments.

item.title: InnovMetric Acquires Strategic Partner Duwe-3d
item.description: Following 27 years of fruitful collaboration that enabled PolyWorks\302\256 to become the universal 3D metrology platform in German-speaking markets, InnovMetric has completed the acquisition of its German business partner Duwe-3d.
